title: Evangelion Figure World Exhibit The Ueno Royal Museum
display_title: Evangelion Figure World Exhibit The Ueno Royal Museum
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Figure World Exhibit â The Ueno Royal Museum             Quote Post by iihieiii » Mon Dec 09, 2013 8:02 pm [url]http://itakon.it/giapponesi/the-kaiyodo-evangelion-figure-world-exhibit-the-ueno-royal-museum-tokyo.html[/url] The Kaiyodo is a leader in the field of miniatures and Action figures long ago. It has been a major company for all fans of Neon Genesis Evangelion, as sole producer, along with Bandai, responsible for producing the Evangelion units, pilots and several other characters before the arrival of several companies began producing “figures”. The company is also responsible for the Revoltech line, the most famous action figures in the world. Was recently hired to create pieces for the American Museum of Natural History. The new enterprise of Kaiyodo’s “The Figure Kaiyodo Evangelion World Exhibit,” an event that is recreated several scenes from Rebuild of Evangelion with their figures. the exhibit happens to November 23 to December 23.
